---
title: "Map Attempt"
author: "Julie Wilson"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Introduction

## Load Packages

```{r load_packages}

install.packages("pacman")
library("pacman")
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, maps, sf, viridis)

install.packages("tidyverse")
library("tidyverse")

install.packages("maps")
library("maps")
```

## Import Data

```{r import_data}
getwd()
read.csv("Final_data.csv")
read.csv("population.csv")

list.files()
```
